title: Luffy Returns From the Mirror World
description: On pages 14–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Luffy, Nami, Sanji as The Straw Hats break through Big Mom’s encirclement as allies buy time and Luffy’s fight reaches its conclusion.
scene: Luffy escapes the mirror world while Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates help the crew break through Big Mom’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Straw hat has escaped from the island!!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I can see it now, Luffy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: to the arms of their crew!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island Finale storyline with 11 dialogue beats. The crew escapes Totto Land through the sacrifices and timing of Jinbe, Germa, and the Sun Pirates.
